spine_sentence: This unit uses Source C and Source D as bounded background for a local evidence-review motivation.
scope_boundary: Motivate evidence review only; do not describe checklist items or evaluate software systems.
core_claims: Source C supports perceived authority of polished prose; Source D supports identifying unsupported assertions; together they justify a local review step.
do_not_change: Do not claim polished prose is always misleading; do not claim citation tools verify truth; do not turn background sources into proof of workflow correctness.
